name: skill-optimizer
description: Build, run, and improve evals for agent skills.

interface.shortDescription: Build, run, and improve evals for agent skills.
interface.longDescription: Create realistic skill eval suites, run them across models, inspect traces and grader evidence, then iterate on the skill or supporting code until behavior improves.
defaultPrompt: Use Skill Optimizer to design and run an eval suite for this agent skill.
Use Skill Optimizer to inspect failing traces and improve the skill.
